name: English Beef Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef into 1-inch cubes.
2. Place steak cubes in a crock-pot.
3. Combine flour, salt, and pepper; toss with steak to coat thoroughly.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients except Biscuit Topping and mix thoroughly.
5. Cover and cook on LOW setting for 7 to 10 hours.
6. One hour before serving, remove meat and vegetables from crock-pot and pour into a shallow 2-1/2-quart baking dish.
7. Preheat oven to 425 degrees.
8. Cover meat mixture with Biscuit Topping.
9. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes.
10. Serve 4 servings (about 2-1/2 quarts).
Biscuit Topping:
2 cups Flour
1 teaspoon Salt
3 teaspoons Baking Powder
1/4 cup Shortening
1/4 cup Milk
Mix dry ingredients. Cut in shortening until mixture resembles coarse cornmeal.
Add milk all at one time; stir well.
Pat out on floured board; roll out to cover baking dish.
